infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Your current location helps confirm where you are marking attendance. This ensures accuracy and allows you to view your location on a map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Background location access is used to continuously monitor attendance and ensure accurate logging of work hours, even when the app is not open.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: This app uses your location to verify attendance at your workplace or client site. Location tracking continues even when the app is in the background to ensure accurate logs.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app needs access to your camera so you can take a profile picture or capture documents like ID cards or receipts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app needs access to your photo library so you can select and upload images such as your profile picture or expense receipts.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: The app may save images (e.g., generated reports or receipts) to your photo library for easy access and sharing.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Microphone access is required to record voice notes, audio messages, or verbal input when submitting forms.
infoPlist.NSDocumentsFolderUsageDescription: This app saves payslips and reports to your device's Documents folder so you can access and share them later.
infoPlist.NSDownloadsFolderUsageDescription: This app downloads payslips and reports so you can access and share them later.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: This app requires FaceID access to allow you to log in quickly and securely.
